title: TinkerQuarry
rootTextStart:
TinkerQuarry

Describe a printable part, turn it into local CAD, then slice it for the printer you choose.

Drop up to 4 images
Build
Checking local AI...
Try an example:
Create a 3D printable mini lamp
Design a parametric phone stand
Make a custom gear with 20 teeth
Create a simple mounting bracket
Design a pencil holder with holes

Examples need the local engine. You can still import a saved design, open a file, or start from code.

My Designs:
Import .kimcad

Built parts you save or import will appear here.

Open File
Open Folder
Start from code →
